data.title: Bitcoin Surpasses Silver in Global Market Capitalization Rankings
data.description: According to PANews, recent data from 8marketcap reveals that Bitcoin has overtaken silver in global market capitalization rankings. This shift is attributed to the continuous decline in silver prices. Currently, silver's market value stands at approximately $1.662 trillion, experiencing a 7.65% drop over the past 24 hours. As a result, silver now ranks 10th in global asset market capitalization, while Bitcoin has moved up to the 9th position.

data.title: Crypto Market Funding Rates Indicate Neutral Sentiment
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the funding rates on major centralized and decentralized exchanges (CEX and DEX) indicate a neutral sentiment in the cryptocurrency market. The market is neither predominantly bearish nor bullish at this time.

Funding rates are fees set by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain a balance between contract prices and the prices of underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the trading platform collecting these fees. The purpose is to adjust the cost or profit of holding contracts, ensuring that contract prices remain close to the underlying asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% is considered the baseline. When the rate exceeds 0.01%, it suggests a bullish market sentiment. Conversely, a rate below 0.005% indicates a bearish outlook.

data.title: Bitcoin Core Releases v29.0rc3 Test Version
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitcoin Core has released the v29.0rc3 test version. This new major update is now available for testing.

data.title: U.S. Bitcoin Spot ETF Experiences Significant Outflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from Farside Investors indicates a net outflow of $64.9 million from U.S. Bitcoin spot ETFs. The breakdown of the outflows includes $17.9 million from Bitwise BITB, $21.8 million from ARK ARKB, and $25.2 million from Grayscale GBTC. This movement reflects a notable shift in investor sentiment towards these financial products.

data.title: UK Prime Minister Discusses Trade Policies with Australian and Italian Leaders
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the UK Prime Minister's office announced that Prime Minister Keir Starmer held phone conversations with Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese and Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni. 

Starmer reiterated that the UK will not rush to retaliate against U.S. President Donald Trump's tariff policies. The spokesperson also noted that the UK, Italy, and Australia agree that a trade war is not in anyone's interest.

data.title: Economic Advisor Discusses Recession and Tariff Impact
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump's economic advisor, Miran, stated that significant changes are necessary for a recession to occur. In 2018, there was no evidence that tariffs contributed to inflation.

Miran highlighted that tax cuts and deregulation are also underway. Imports account for only 14% of the GDP. Market fluctuations are inevitable due to tariffs.

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway’s Warren Buffett caught up in the trade war, what did he really say about Trump tariffs?
data.description:
Berkshire Hathaway chair Warren Buffett found himself at the center of a political controversy after US President Donald Trump shared a video on Truth Social claiming he supported Trump’s recent tariff policies. The video suggested that Trump’s tariffs would force the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, making stocks more accessible to middle-class Americans. According […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/warren-buffett-in-the-trump-tariff-trade-war/

data.title: Bitcoin surpasses silver to become the ninth largest asset in the world
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News 8marketcap latest data shows that due to the continued decline in silver prices, its market value in global assets has been surpassed by Bitcoin. The current market value of silver is about 1.662 trillion US dollars, with a 24-hour drop of 7.65%, ranking 10th in the global asset market value, and Bitcoin has surpassed it to 9th place.

data.title: Ave.ai officially launches Ave Cloud at the 2025 Chain Ecosystem Carnival
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 5, Ave.ai, a leading on-chain aggregation trading platform, announced the official launch of Ave Cloud (API 2.0) at the "2025 On-Chain Ecosystem Carnival".
Ave Cloud (cloud.ave.ai) includes two types of API modules: data API and transaction API, which are designed to serve on-chain business developers, including free and paid service modes.
Ave data API is built based on Ave's full data, integrating 130+ public chains, 300+ DEX, 10+ LaunchPad, 10M+ Token data, and supporting more than 40 on-chain data dimensions.
Ave transaction API has performance advantages such as MEV protection, low gas, security and extremely fast matching, supports strategy customization and modular development, and helps quantitative trading, automated strategy execution and the rapid construction of diversified trading products.
"Through an open strategy, Ave will link and support more on-chain developers, support them in building a one-stop service from market data to trading orders, and jointly expand the on-chain ecosystem." Ave's relevant person in charge said.

data.title: Deribit: A user sold 100 BTC in total for $90,000 in BTC call and put options at the end of December
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LinChen, head of Asia Pacific business at Deribit, posted on the X platform that today’s largest BTC option transaction was a user who sold a $90,000 Bitcoin call option and a $90,000 Bitcoin put option at the end of December, totaling 100 BTC, earning $1.565 million in premiums, with a profit range of $84,000 to $104,000 at maturity, and an annualized return of about 24.5% in coin standard. Short volatility.
